description.value:
Starting at level 3, you begin studying your allies ways of fighting and their styles.
By applying your specialty and training to their routines, you may be able to help them become better shinobi all around.
You can affect a number of creatures equal to your Charisma modifier.

  • Dancer: You create a specific and somewhat rigid exercise for them to follow in the morning after a long rest, making the body more flexible and ready for action.
    Everyone that joins in your exercise, including your bodyguard, gains 3 x proficiency modifier temporary HP for the day.

  • Strategic: You find various mistakes in your allies' strategy and movements and devise a morning lesson after a long rest on how to improve those mistakes.
    Everyone that joins you in this preparation will have their AC increased by 1 for the entire day.

  • Eloquence: You give a rousing speech to encourage your allies to give their best and not give up, even in the worst situations.
    Everyone that listens to your speech gains +1 to all of their saving throws for the entire day.

At level 7, you become more skilled at helping your allies:

  • Dancer: The temporary HP increases to 5 x proficiency modifier and this temporary HP cannot be ignored or bypassed by any type of skill, trait, feat, or jutsu of any kind.
  • Strategic: Your allies now gain +2 AC and no skill, feat, or jutsu can prevent them from taking a reaction against a jutsu or skill.
  • Eloquence: The saving throws increase goes up to +2 and, in case of failure, they can roll an additional 1d4 once per day to turn that failure into a success.

At level 11, your insight into your allies needs becomes even greater:

  • Dancer: Your allies can survive, once per day, a hit that would drop them to 0 HP, instead going to 1 HP.
  • Strategic: Your allies can ignore, once per day, a critical hit and turn it into a normal hit.
  • Eloquence: Your allies can decide to succeed, once per day, on one saving throw they fail.
